overview: Llama 4 Scout is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 4 line. Released 2025-04-05. Meta's flagship open-weight, natively multimodal mixture-of-experts 'herd' — the Llama 4 generation.
What's notable in this version: 17B active parameters, 16 experts, 109B total; natively multimodal MoE with an industry-leading 10M-token context window, runnable on a single H100 (Int4).
